entities.name: CONIESTA IGNEFUSALIS
entities.description: A lepidopteran stem-borer pest that affects millet

entities.name: MILLET
entities.description: The host crop targeted by the stem-borer

entities.name: HABITAT SITE SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing a location for living or breeding

entities.name: CROP DAMAGE
entities.description: The physical harm caused to the crop by the pest

entities.name: OVIPOSITION PREFERENCE
entities.description: The preference of the female pest for specific sites to lay eggs

entities.name: MILLET GRAIN WEIGHT
entities.description: A measure of the weight of millet grains used to evaluate damage

entities.name: STEM-BORER LARVAL HOLES
entities.description: Exit and entrance holes created by larvae in the stems

entities.name: DIAPAUSING LARVAE
entities.description: Larvae of the pest in a state of dormancy

entities.name: INTERNODES
entities.description: The sections of the millet stem between nodes

entities.name: DRY MILLET STEMS
entities.description: The state of millet stems after drying, particularly when stacked

entities.name: GREEN MILLET PLANTS
entities.description: The state of millet plants while they are growing and green

entities.name: LEAF SHEATHS
entities.description: The part of the millet plant that wraps around the stem

entities.name: PAPER SUBSTRATES
entities.description: Artificial materials used to test oviposition preference

entities.name: IPM
entities.description: Integrated Pest Management strategies for controlling the pest
